# GCP Service Account (synthetic)
{
  "type": "service_account",
  "project_id": "my-project-123456",
  "private_key_id": "abc123def456",
  "client_email": "my-service-account@my-project.iam.gserviceaccount.com"
}

# Azure Storage Connection String
AZURE_STORAGE_CONNECTION_STRING=DefaultEndpointsProtocol=https;AccountName=mystorageaccount;AccountKey=EXAMPLEKEY==;EndpointSuffix=core.windows.net
